description: This file defines the RootRouter widget, managing the main navigation flow of a Flutter app. It uses Provider for state management and conditionally displays different screens based on app initialization and authentication status.

classes.name: RootRouter
classes.description: A StatefulWidget that serves as the main router, displaying different screens based on application state.

classes.name: _RootRouterState
classes.description: State class for RootRouter, contains logic to decide which widget to render based on app state.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the widget tree, conditionally rendering the loading screen, login screen, or notes list based on app state.
